description: Golden Run Validation Plan — expected invariants for measurement correctness

positive_invariants.description: Warm connections should be faster than cold (no TLS handshake)
Rust app_time should be less than Python app_time
positive_invariants.if_violated: Workload contract mismatch or Server-Timing not working

positive_invariants.description: nginx proxy overhead should be similar for both languages
Server-Timing app;dur should approximately match proxy upstream;dur
Error rate should be approximately 0% for a clean run
Forced HTTP version should be the actual negotiated protocol

negative_controls.description: Force HTTP/3 against HAProxy (no QUIC support)
negative_controls.action: Request h3 mode for HAProxy proxy
negative_controls.expected: protocol_mismatch = true OR http3 mode filtered out
negative_controls.if_not_triggered: Protocol mismatch detection pipeline is broken

negative_controls.description: Omit Timing-Allow-Origin header from one test
negative_controls.action: Deploy a language without the Timing-Allow-Origin response header
negative_controls.expected: Raw timing fields (dns_ms, tcp_ms, etc.) are zeroed or absent
negative_controls.if_not_triggered: Measurement quality badge system is broken
